arts.ttl: PSG vs. Atletico Madrid: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: UEFA Champions League winners Paris Saint-Germain face off against a familiar opponent in their Club World Cup opener, as Atlético Madrid await in Pasadena on Sunday. There were no major surprises in regard to Luis Enrique’s 24-man squad for the tournament, but the Spaniard is set to shuffle his pack from the Champions League final for their opening game on Sunday evening.
